headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Dow (DOW) After Its 40% Year To Date Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Dow is still priced attractively after its recent run, or if the easy value has already been taken, this article breaks down what the numbers are really saying about the stock. At a last close of US$33.97, Dow has delivered a 0.7% gain over the past week, a fall of 11.8% over the past month, a 40.0% return year to date, and a 25.2% return over the past year. Taken together, these figures give mixed signals about how the market is reassessing its potential and...
